Meta Code Book

Chapter 5 All Measures

library(dplyr)
## 
## Attaching package: 'dplyr'
## The following objects are masked from 'package:stats':
## 
##     filter, lag
## The following objects are masked from 'package:base':
## 
##     intersect, setdiff, setequal, union
library(tidyr)
library(DT)
library(htmltools)
library(shiny)
## 
## Attaching package: 'shiny'
## The following objects are masked from 'package:DT':
## 
##     dataTableOutput, renderDataTable
library(fontawesome)
library(stringr)
library(readxl)
library(writexl)

# ==============================
# LOAD DATA
# ==============================
mr21 <- read_xlsx("Codebook/MR21_codebook.xlsx")
maxed <- read_xlsx("Codebook/maxed_codebook.xlsx")
powered <- read_xlsx("Codebook/powered_codebook.xlsx")

# ==============================
# CLEANING FUNCTIONS
# ==============================
clean_name <- function(x) {
  x %>%
    str_to_lower() %>%
    str_trim() %>%
    str_replace_all("&", "and") %>%
    str_replace_all("[^a-z0-9]", "")
}

format_measure <- function(x) {
  x %>%
    str_replace_all("_", " ") %>%
    str_squish() %>%
    str_to_upper()
}

# ==============================
# RECODE MAP
# ==============================
recode_auto <- c(
  "BIS_BAS" = "BIS/BAS",
  "mmq" = "Mini Menstrual Questionnaire",
  "MMQ" = "Mini Menstrual Questionnaire",
  "Diamond" = "DIAMOND",
  "Ede" = "Eating Disorder Examination",
  "CSSRS" = "Columbia Suicide Severity Rating Scale",
  "Efq" = "Eating Fears Questionnaire (EFQ)",
  "DFM" = "Drive for Muscularity",
  "Cet" = "CET",
  "Eds" = "Exercise Dependence Scale",
  "IUS-Sf" = "Intolerance of Uncertainty-Short Form",
  "IUS-SF" = "Intolerance of Uncertainty-Short Form",
  "IUS-S" = "Intolerance of Uncertainty-Short Form",
  "Aed" = "Analogous Exercise Decisions"
)

# ==============================
# APPLY CLEANING
# ==============================
mr21_clean <- mr21 %>%
  mutate(
    Measure = recode(Measure, !!!recode_auto),
    Measure = format_measure(Measure),
    Project = "MR21"
  )

maxed_clean <- maxed %>%
  mutate(
    Measure = recode(Measure, !!!recode_auto),
    Measure = format_measure(Measure),
    Project = "MAXED"
  )

powered_clean <- powered %>%
  mutate(
    Measure = recode(Measure, !!!recode_auto),
    Measure = format_measure(Measure),
    Project = "POWERED"
  )

# ==============================
# COMBINE DATA
# ==============================
comparison1 <- bind_rows(maxed_clean, mr21_clean, powered_clean)

# ==============================
# VARIABLE SUMMARY
# ==============================
variable_summary <- bind_rows(
  maxed_clean %>% distinct(Variable, Measure, Project),
  mr21_clean %>% distinct(Variable, Measure, Project),
  powered_clean %>% distinct(Variable, Measure, Project)
) %>%
  group_by(Variable) %>%
  summarise(
    Measures = paste(sort(unique(format_measure(Measure))), collapse = " | "),
    In_MAXED = any(Project == "MAXED"),
    In_MR21 = any(Project == "MR21"),
    In_POWERED = any(Project == "POWERED"),
    VariableType = case_when(
      In_MAXED & In_MR21 & In_POWERED ~ "Shared",
      In_MAXED | In_MR21 | In_POWERED ~ "Mixed",
      In_MAXED ~ "MAXED only",
      In_MR21 ~ "MR21 only",
      In_POWERED ~ "POWERED only"
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# ==============================
# MERGE BACK
# ==============================
comparison1 <- comparison1 %>%
  left_join(variable_summary, by = "Variable") %>%
  mutate(
    VarFilter = case_when(
      VariableType == "Shared" ~ "shared",
      VariableType == "MAXED only" ~ "MAXED",
      VariableType == "MR21 only" ~ "MR21",
      VariableType == "POWERED only" ~ "POWERED",
      TRUE ~ "mixed"
    ),

    ProjectBadges = case_when(
      VarFilter == "shared" ~ paste(
        "<span class='badge maxed'>MAXED</span>",
        "<span class='badge mr21'>MR21</span>",
        "<span class='badge powered'>POWERED</span>"
      ),
      VarFilter == "MAXED" ~ "<span class='badge maxed'>MAXED</span>",
      VarFilter == "MR21" ~ "<span class='badge mr21'>MR21</span>",
      VarFilter == "POWERED" ~ "<span class='badge powered'>POWERED</span>",
      TRUE ~ ""
    )
  )

# ==============================
# MEASURE BADGES
# ==============================
measure_badges <- comparison1 %>%
  group_by(Measure) %>%
  summarise(
    has_MAXED = any(VarFilter %in% c("MAXED", "shared")),
    has_MR21 = any(VarFilter %in% c("MR21", "shared")),
    has_POWERED = any(VarFilter %in% c("POWERED", "shared")),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    MeasureBadges = paste0(
      ifelse(has_MAXED, "<span class='badge maxed'>MAXED</span>", ""),
      ifelse(has_MR21, "<span class='badge mr21'>MR21</span>", ""),
      ifelse(has_POWERED, "<span class='badge powered'>POWERED</span>", "")
    )
  )

# ==============================
# CSS
# ==============================
css <- HTML("
<style>
.badge {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 3px 8px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  color: white;
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 700;
}
.badge + .badge { margin-left: 4px; }

.badge.maxed { background-color: #FF922B; }
.badge.mr21 { background-color: #339AF0; }
.badge.powered { background-color: #9B59B6; }

.filter-btn {
  border: none;
  padding: 6px 14px;
  border-radius: 14px;
  margin: 4px;
  font-weight: 700;
  cursor: pointer;
  opacity: 0.35;
  transition: all 0.2s ease-in-out;
}

.filter-btn.active {
  opacity: 1;
  transform: scale(1.05);
}

.filter-btn.maxed { background-color: #FF922B; color: white; }
.filter-btn.mr21 { background-color: #339AF0; color: white; }
.filter-btn.powered { background-color: #9B59B6; color: white; }
.filter-btn.all { background-color: #6c757d; color: white; }

.details-content { margin-top: 8px; }
</style>
")

# ==============================
# FILTER BUTTONS + JS
# ==============================
top_filters <- HTML("
<div style='margin-bottom:12px;'>
  <button id='btn-all' class='filter-btn all active' onclick='filterAll()'>All</button>
  <button id='btn-maxed' class='filter-btn maxed' onclick=\"filterProject('MAXED')\">MAXED</button>
  <button id='btn-mr21' class='filter-btn mr21' onclick=\"filterProject('MR21')\">MR21</button>
  <button id='btn-powered' class='filter-btn powered' onclick=\"filterProject('POWERED')\">POWERED</button>
</div>

<script>
function setActive(btn){
  document.querySelectorAll('.filter-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById(btn).classList.add('active');
}

function filterAll(){
  document.querySelectorAll('.measure-block').forEach(el => el.style.display = '');
  setActive('btn-all');
}

function filterProject(project){
  document.querySelectorAll('.measure-block').forEach(el => {

    const filters = (el.getAttribute('data-filter') || '').split(' ');

    const show =
      filters.includes(project) ||
      filters.includes('shared');

    el.style.display = show ? '' : 'none';
  });

  if(project === 'MAXED') setActive('btn-maxed');
  else if(project === 'MR21') setActive('btn-mr21');
  else if(project === 'POWERED') setActive('btn-powered');
}
</script>
")

# ==============================
# BUILD MEASURE SECTIONS
# ==============================
measure_list <- sort(unique(comparison1$Measure))

measure_sections <- lapply(measure_list, function(measure_name){

  vars <- comparison1 %>%
    filter(Measure == measure_name)

  badge <- measure_badges %>%
    filter(Measure == measure_name) %>%
    pull(MeasureBadges)

  if (length(badge) == 0) badge <- ""

  tbl <- DT::datatable(
    vars %>%
      select(Variable, Label, Value, ProjectBadges, VarFilter),
    escape = FALSE,
    rownames = FALSE,
    options = list(pageLength = 10),
    colnames = c("Variable", "Label", "Value", "Project", "Filter")
  )

  tags$details(
    class = "measure-block",
    `data-filter` = paste(na.omit(unique(vars$VarFilter)), collapse = " "),

    tags$summary(
      HTML(paste0("<strong>", measure_name, "</strong> ", badge))
    ),

    tags$div(class = "details-content", tbl)
  )
})

# ==============================
# FINAL OUTPUT
# ==============================
tagList(
  css,
  top_filters,
  measure_sections
)
